title: Senior Financial Analyst - SEBI - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SEBI - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
